criterion: The response delivers an Amadeus PDX to YUL fare band for a two-traveller scenario in the August 2027 window.
The response delivers an Amadeus PDX to YUL fare band for a three-traveller scenario in the August 2027 window.
justification: Three-traveller fare band is contingent on Sienna Park clearing her Copperstone August window per the prompt ('two travellers minimum, three if Sienna clears her August window'). R1 (two-traveller fare band at score 5) is the primary answer; three-traveller is a supporting secondary scenario. Kensei Phase 4.11 score proportionality: secondary scenarios take score 1, not 3.

justification: R4 is the general final_answer text-mention that a pre-trip A1C review is scheduled; R31 is the specific state_change semantic check that the calendar event lands within the June 2027 paperwork-runway window at score 3. Kensei Phase 5.4 avoids duplicate coverage at the same weight: R4 downgraded to score 1 to complement R31 rather than duplicate it.

The response saves a Gmail draft time-off request to Andrea Marsh that cites Yves's standing bi-weekly shift bid pattern as backing for the request.
justification: Channel B semantic check on draft content quality (does the body cite the shift-bid pattern?). Channel A test_gmail_agent_posted_draft_to_andrea checks the mechanical POST-draft action at weight 5 and is the critical part; R30 covers the semantic content quality on top of that mechanical check at weight 3. Intentional distinct-signal double-coverage per Rubric_QC_KT Phase 2.8.3: an agent that POSTs a draft without shift-bid backing passes the test but fails this rubric criterion. Score 3 (was 5) reflects that content quality is important-not-critical; the primary mechanical action is credited by Channel A.

justification: Channel B semantic check on event timing quality (does it fall in the June 2027 paperwork-runway window?). Intentional distinct-signal double-coverage per Rubric_QC_KT Phase 2.8.3: an agent that schedules the A1C event in the wrong month passes the test but fails this rubric criterion.

criterion: The response fuses recipe-card content from the Grand-pere Henri recipes folder with archive photo content from the Montreal kitchen collection in the memento outline.
justification: Cross-modal fusion criterion per Rubric_QC_KT Phase 8.2: the memento outline must fuse the PDF recipe-card scans (data/10) with the JPG family archive photo (data/11) rather than treating each modality in isolation. Anchors the multimodal fusion requirement and raises MM criterion weight above the 0.30 floor of positive rubric score so text_only_ratio lands below the Phase 8.3 0.80 Moderate threshold.
